Flow.description: if an agreement status is expired, post a chatter and flag as owner the CRM in charge of the agreement
Flow.label: Agreement_PB002_PostAChatterAndFlagOwner

value.stringValue: Agreement Under Termination Process to be followed
Agreement Request Rejected need to be reviewed
Agreement under Termination process to be followed
Agreement under Grid Renewal process to be followed
Agreement under Renewal process to be followed
Agreement will expire in 2 months - update as needed
